merge_dependabot.description: Review and merge open Dependabot PRs

create_release.description: Create GitHub Release with tag + changelog

add_tests.description: Add test suites for untested modules

notes: Run 2996-2997: refactor on sauravcode (extracted _termcolors.py shared module — deduplicated ~70 lines of ANSI color helpers from sauravkata, sauravlearn, sauravpipe, sauravrepl, sauravtest into Colors class). create_release on GraphVisual (v2.54.0 — migration snapshot perf: reuse prev snapshot map, single-pass getSummary).
previousNotes: Run 2990-2991: add_codeql on agenticchat (added .github/codeql-config.yml with security-and-quality query suite, path exclusions for tests/docs/node_modules, filtered noisy rules). deploy_pages on FeedReader (new changelog.html page with full release history v1.0.0-v1.3.0, added to nav across all 8 pages, updated sitemap).

Run 2988-2989: perf_improvement on ai (pre-compiled 6 regex pattern lists and pre-matched statements in deception_detector — O(n²×2P) regex calls → O(n×2P) pre-match + O(n²) set intersections in inconsistency detection). security_fix on BioBots (XSS escaping in fleet-commander.html — escapeHtml for all localStorage-sourced string data rendered via innerHTML, plus type validation on load).

Run 2986-2987: repo_topics on sauravbhattacharya001 (replaced redundant 'personal'/'about-me' with 'dotnet'/'natural-language-processing' for better discoverability). docs_site on gif-captcha (new directory.html — searchable catalog of all 67 interactive tools organized into 7 categories with live filtering and section counts, linked from index.html).

Run 2978-2979: perf_improvement on agenticchat (spatial grid index for O(1) collision detection in WordCloudGenerator — replaced O(placed) linear scan with 64px grid partitioning for spiral placement). create_release on everything (v7.30.0 — Expense Forecaster, Smart Pattern Detector, Daily Challenge Generator, Smart Streak Guardian).
previousPreviousNotes: Run 2970-2971: refactor on GraphVisual (cached directed adjacency map and analysis result in TopologicalSortAnalyzer — eliminated 3× redundant O(V+E) graph traversals in generateSummary/analyzeDependencies/countChoicePoints). create_release on gif-captcha (v1.12.0 — Genetic Arms Race simulator, Immune System adaptive defense, dependabot config).
previousNotes: Run 2968-2969: perf_improvement on agentlens (single-pass event classification and model aggregation in NarrativeGenerator — O(4·E)→O(E) event classifying, O(models×E)→O(E) model token counting). security_fix on BioBots (prototype pollution guards in experimentTracker.importAll and PrintQueue.fromJSON — reject dangerous keys, sanitize imported JSON data).

Run 2966-2967: refactor on GraphVisual (deduplicated 6 copy-pasted Edmonds-Karp BFS augmentation loops in VertexConnectivityAnalyzer — extracted buildResidual, buildEdgeCapacity, runMaxFlow, bfsFindPath, applyAugmentation, bfsReachable helpers, -116 lines). create_release on prompt (v5.11.0 — ReDoS timeout guards on 25+ unprotected Regex calls).

Run 2964-2965: perf_improvement on ai (in-place DFS in attack_graph._find_all_paths — eliminated O(b^d * d) list allocations from path_ids+[x] concatenation, added visited set for O(1) cycle checks). security_fix on WinSentinel (reject Windows reserved device names CON/NUL/PRN/AUX/COMx/LPTx in InputSanitizer.ValidateFilePath — prevents silent data loss during quarantine and DoS via device name paths).

Run 2962-2963: perf_improvement on BioBots (cached daily usage in equipmentScheduler slot suggestion — O(days×bookings) vs O(slots×bookings), inlined booking count in computeUtilization). refactor on agenticchat (deduplicated code-block stripping in ConversationSummarizer — extractDecisions+extractActionItems shared pre-stripped content).
previousPreviousNotes: Run 2958-2959: security_fix on prompt (ReDoS timeout guards for 25+ unprotected Regex calls in PromptAutopilot and PromptAudienceAdapter). refactor on sauravcode (pre-compiled regexes + fixed 'func' keyword to 'function' in sauravintent and sauravmentor — both modules couldn't detect any function definitions).
previousPreviousPreviousNotes: Run 2956-2957: refactor on VoronoiMap (deduplicated _clamp/_lerp/_lerp_color into vormap_utils — removed 10 inlined copies across 6 modules). add_dependabot on getagentbox (added npm ecosystem with grouped updates to dependabot config).
previousPreviousPreviousPreviousNotes: Run 2952-2953: perf_improvement on agenticchat (pre-compiled gi-flagged RegExp patterns in ModelAdvisor _analyzeContent â€” eliminated up to 39 RegExp allocations per call). refactor on Vidly (deduplicated CalculateShannonEvenness from CustomerWrappedService into shared CustomerRentalAnalytics.ShannonEntropy overload).
previousPreviousPreviousPreviousPrevious: Run 2946-2947: refactor on gif-captcha (deduplicated ~80 lines of inlined LruTracker, _clamp, _now from trust-score-engine.js â€” replaced with imports from shared-utils.js). perf_improvement on VoronoiMap (eliminated O(nÂ²) sqrt calls in PSO objective functions â€” squared-distance comparisons in _obj_max_spread, _obj_min_energy, _nearest_neighbor_dists).

Run 2944-2945: perf_improvement on ai (eliminated redundant O(agents*N) interaction scans in game_theory â€” pre-built per-agent move sequences, single global_cooperation_rate computation). create_release on everything (v7.29.0 â€” Goal Autopilot, Smart Habit Insights, 56 tests, streak refactor, 2 CI bumps).

Run 2936-2937: perf_improvement on GraphVisual (lazy BFS initialization in EdgeBetweennessAnalyzer â€” O(reachable) per source instead of O(V) full-vertex init). add_tests on ai (25 tests for circuit_breaker â€” state machine lifecycle, adaptive thresholds, journal, fleet management).
